title: Timeline
intro: This timeline follows the Town of Islip from Indigenous land and colonial patents to Revolution, local government, community-building, and public history today.

It is not complete. It is a working timeline built from sources currently digitized for the Town of Islip History Project. More dates and events will be added as additional records, photographs, maps, and vignettes are processed.
workingNote: This is a working timeline. More dates and events will be added as additional sources are digitized and reviewed.
translationNote: These entries are shown in English while the Spanish translation is prepared.
